summary: Assessment of the pipeline_issues_report.md against actual chapter outline data. Concludes that the report correctly identifies chronological fragmentation symptoms but misidentifies the root cause (THEMATIC mapping is by design, not a bug) and proposes over-engineered solutions ([CHRONIC]/[TIMELINE] labeling, Scattering) that would break the framework. Recommends instead: verify previous_context injection, check callback_to/foreshadow compliance, and add a CAUSAL BRIDGE prompt rule if needed.
